ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED**AS UNTIMELY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-11-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS THOMAS ZAVIEH IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MEGAN ZAVIEH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY KELVIN SU. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. IF NOT APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE MATTER, THE CASE WILLL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF THOMAS ZAVIEH IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MEGAN ZAVIEH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LELVIN SU. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAVIEH, MEGAN
